memoryArtifacts.headline: 71246 Lady Curry Rivel Female LK7P-681 Birth 14 August 1423
Info
memoryArtifacts.description: The unusual name, Curry Rivel, comes from the Celtic word "Crwy", meaning boundry and Rivel from its 12th century landlord Sir. Submitted by Richard Revel. Also known as Lady Curry (Rivel) Swete.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Curry Rivel於1423年8月14日出生在英國英格蘭維斯特莫藍德時，她的父親John Rivel28歲，母親Agnas Burton15歲。她於大約1448年與Sir Thomas Swete在英國英格蘭薩默塞特加里 利維爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。她去世於1500年5月29日在英國英格蘭戴文莫德波利享年76歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Curry Rivel于1423年8月14日出生在英国英格兰維斯特莫藍德时，她的父亲John Rivel28岁，母亲Agnas Burton15岁。她于大约1448年与Sir Thomas Swete在英国英格兰薩默塞特加里 利維爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。她去世于1500年5月29日在英国英格兰戴文莫德波利享年76岁，埋葬在英国英格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Rivel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Middlesex): from the Middle English female personal name Rimilde, Rimilda, from Old English or Old Norse Rimhild, perhaps derived from hrīm ‘frost’ + hild ‘battle’, or more likely from the corresponding Old Norse words; a (H)rimhild was the wife of Knut Sveinson of Jadar, according to Snorri Sturluson in Heimskringla. This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Rimmel
meanings: English (Middlesex): variant of   Rimel  . This surname is now rare in Britain.
German: variant of Rimmele, from Rümelin, a pet form of the ancient Germanic personal name Ruombald, a compound of hruom ‘glory’ + balt ‘bold, brave’.

nameMeanings.name: Curry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Curry Rivel was born on 14 August 1423, in Westmorland, England, United Kingdom, her father, John Rivel, was 28 and her mother, Agnas Burton, was 15. She married Sir Thomas Swete about 1448, in Curry Rivel, Somerset, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. She died on 29 May 1500, in Modbury, Devon, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 76, and was buried in England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Curry Rivel est née le 14 août 1423, à Westmorland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Rivel, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Agnas Burton, avait 15 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Thomas Swete environ 1448, à Curry Rivel, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Elle est décédée le 29 mai 1500, à Modbury, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 76 ans, et a été enterrée à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Curry Rivel am 14. August 1423 in Westmorland, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Rivel 28 und ihre Mutter Agnas Burton 15. Sie hat um 1448 in Curry Rivel, Somerset, England, United Kingdom Sir Thomas Swete geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Sie starb am 29. Mai 1500 im Alter von 76 Jahren in Modbury, Devon, England, United Kingdom und wurde in England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Curry Rivel è nata il il 14 agosto 1423 nel Westmorland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, John Rivel, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Agnas Burton, aveva 15 anni. Lei sposato Sir Thomas Swete circa 1448, nel Curry Rivel, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì il 29 maggio 1500, nel Modbury, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 76 anni, e fu sepolta a Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Curry Rivelが1423年8月14日にイギリスイギリスウエストモーランドで生まれた時，父John Rivelは28歳，母Agnas Burtonは15歳であった。約1448年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトクウリー リベルでSir Thomas Sweteと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼女は1500年5月29日にイギリスイギリスデボンモドブリーで76歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Curry Rivel(이)가 1423년 8월 14일 영국 잉글랜드 웨스트모를랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Rivel(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnas Burton(은)는 15세였다. 그녀는 대략 1448년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 커리 라이벨에서 Sir Thomas Swete(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1500년 5월 29일 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 모드버이에서 76세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Curry Rivel nasceu em 14 de agosto de 1423, em Westmorland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Rivel, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Agnas Burton, tinha 15 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Thomas Swete aproximadamente 1448, em Curry Rivel, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ela faleceu em 29 de maio de 1500, em Modbury, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 76 anos, e foi sepultada em Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Curry Rivel родилась 14 августа 1423 г. в местности вестморланд, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John Rivel было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnas Burton, 15. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Thomas Swete около 1448 г. в местности курри ривел, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Она умерла 29 мая 1500 г. в местности модбури, девон, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 76 лет и была похоронена в местности Англия, Великобритания.
